omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Contact Information and Contact Communications: Whenever you contact us (for example, through online contact forms available through the Citymapper's websites, by seeking customer support, providing feedback, responding to one of our messages or survey requests, by signing up to our Newsletter, etc.), we will collect any information you provide, which may include the content of your messages to us and any attachments, and depending on the communication, your name, and contact information such as email address or telephone number, organization and title, country or mailing address (if you contact us on behalf of an actual or potential Enterprise Customer). We will also collect information which is apparent from your communication (for example, the email address or phone number from which you contacted us) and our communications and correspondence. If you communicate with us by telephone or other audio or video communication platforms, we may record the audio or video of our communications, create transcripts, and retain the recordings or transcripts consistent with applicable law. In certain instances, we may provide you an opportunity to indicate your preferences for our future communications, and we will collect any preferences you indicate.

Saved and Shared Preferences: You may choose to select preferences and provide us with information on your home address, work address, and other saved places to receive personalised journey-planning Services and to expedite your searches. If you enable these in-app permissions, you may also share information with us from other apps, including through your third-party calendar app, so that you can get information about your upcoming events and help you get to them on time.
